top_signals.title: Korean Stocks Surge as Iran Deal Hopes Spark Chip Stock Rally
top_signals.summary: South Korean stocks surged as investors piled back into the country’s hot chipmakers after President Donald Trump signaled the US was nearing a potential deal with Iran, easing Middle East tensions.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: PeaceGold, SigraFi sign responsible artisanal gold supply deal in DRC
top_signals.summary: PeaceGold was set up in 2013 with local nonprofit Conflict Resolution Center to help formalize artisanal mining and reintegrate former combatants into regulated work.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: California natural gas prices reach historic lows in early 2026
top_signals.summary: Monthly average natural gas spot prices in California reached record lows in the first five months of 2026, dropping to values last recorded in the nationwide low-price market of 2024. Record lows were recorded in Northern California's PG&E Citygate and Southern California's SoCal Border Average; SoCal Citygate prices fell to near-record lows but remained higher than some 2024 prices. Several factors contribute to California's low prices, including above-average inventories and decreasing in-state demand for natural gas-fired electricity.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Corporate Profits Hit Record High Versus India’s Economy Even as Stocks Struggle
top_signals.summary: Companies are upbeat about demand and capital spending, ICICI Securities says.

top_signals.title: Jakarta Deploys Thousands of Police as Students Protest Prabowo
top_signals.summary: Indonesian authorities will deploy thousands of police and soldiers ahead of a planned protest by students, who are angry at the rising cost of living and want President Prabowo Subianto to rein in big-ticket spending and revive the economy.

top_signals.title: One year after Brian Wilson’s death: Beach Boys founder a genius like no other
top_signals.summary: A year ago today, Brian Wilson, the introverted, vulnerable genius behind the Beach Boys, died in his sleep at home in Beverly Hills. He was 82 years old, and his health was ruined: his death certificate included respiratory arrest, sepsis, cystitis, neurodegenerative disorder, obstructive sleep apnoea and chronic kidney disease. His mental state had long been [...]
